rationale: Bootstrap downside warnings justify testing drawdown-reclaim entries that wait for repair evidence instead of pure trend recapture.
expected_failure_mode: fails Gold all-era economics or Future Confidence before promotion
stop_conditions: near-Gold candidate repeats known Gold contract failures
quick grid has no candidate worth full certification
overlay worsens drawdown or live-era share multiple
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
reclaim trigger exits too late during bear continuation
candidate improves drawdown but loses real-era or modern-era economics
